selection_rule: Selected because its saved zero-shot POS metrics match the MICCAI paper Table 1 VECL POS row across Open-I, CheXpert, ChestXray14, ChestXDet10, and PadChest. The alternate VECL_pretrain checkpoint did not have a complete matching score file.

verification.load_test: passed previously with local BioClinicalMPBERT and M3AE paths
verification.dataset_path_check: Open-I and CheXpert roots under /hdd/common/datasets/medical-image-analysis exist but their file layouts do not match the repository evaluation CSVs; ChestXray14, ChestXDet10, and PadChest roots were found under /hdd/wuwl/datasets/medical-image-analysis.
verification.full_zero_shot_rerun: attempted but not completed in the interactive window because available Open-I/CheXpert image layouts did not match the repository metadata and the remaining multi-dataset run exceeded the session window.
